log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Dhampir — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:16+3=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:13+-2=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/3 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Dhampir — Armored Escapist with Greataxe: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 20] MISS.
Frost Giant attacks Dhampir — Armored Escapist with Greataxe: [d20:11+9=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 25 damage. Dhampir — Armored Escapist HP: 34/59
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Dhampir — Armored Escapist with Greatclub: [d20:4+6=10 vs AC 20] MISS.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Dhampir — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:17+3=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Dhampir — Armored Escapist with Greataxe: [d20:9+9=18 vs AC 20] MISS.
Frost Giant attacks Dhampir — Armored Escapist with Greataxe: [d20:19+9=28 vs AC 20] HIT! 31 damage. Dhampir — Armored Escapist HP: 3/59
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Dhampir — Armored Escapist with Greatclub: [d20:20+6=26 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 21 damage. Dhampir — Armored Escapist HP: 0/59
→ Dhampir — Armored Escapist loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 8 vs DC 10]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
